3317350.name: Capacity
3317350.description: This game immerses you in a magical town, where your character searches for hidden treasure chests in a maze like environment. Use the WASD key to move your character and change the perspective with the mouse to help explore this fascinating world. This small town is filled with various exotic plants and complex wooden structures, creating a mysterious and charming environment. The treasure chest is scattered among these elements and requires careful observation and continuous exploration to discover. Every time you discover a box, your score increases by 10 points, motivating you to continue your exploration and discover more secrets. Enhanced the dreamy atmosphere, allowing you to truly feel a part of the magical kingdom.
